name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M12598 Monogram 👏👏 The 'Victoire Wallet' elegantly carries coins, cards, bills, and receipts in a single-piece Monogram canvas. Unbuttoning it reveals a bill pocket, five slots for credit cards and tickets, and a coin pocket with a zipper. Its size suitable for any pocket is also attractive. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm
